name: Avatar The Last Airbender RPG
description:
To start with the bot you need to create your own story or describe your persona and who you wanna be in the original story the bot might not make the perfect one at first, its better to try resetting the storyline layout or retry the generator.

Characters that are already included:

Aang, Katara, Sokka, Toph, Zuko, Momo, Appa, Iroh, Azula

you can still add any custom or original characters however you want to.

Leave a comment on how the bot went or anything that i need to fix!
creator: CrimsonHex4
